reviews.comment:
Perfecto el lugar para detenerse camino a Córdoba. Tiene unas mesas bajo los arboles y podes parar a comer algo. Muy tranquilo.

(Translated by Google)
A perfect place to stop on the way to Córdoba. It has some tables under the trees where you can stop for a bite to eat. Very peaceful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3NmJuUllBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para parar en ruta y descansar.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop and rest along the way.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnLTRySC1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mi parada favorita, poca gente, baños impecables y con papel, la gente amable, sombra. Todo bueno.

(Translated by Google)
My favorite stop: few people, spotless restrooms with toilet paper, friendly people, shade. Everything was great.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnLTRIVTV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Especial para cargar combustible y descansar un rato bajo los árboles. Fundamental si tenés niños o mascotas

(Translated by Google)
Perfect for refueling and relaxing under the trees. Essential if you have children or pets.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNGVtb3BnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación de servicio que va! Las demás se quedan piolas. Tienen todo y siempre está vacía. Atienden rápido y con la mejor

(Translated by Google)
The gas station is working! The others are just fine. They have everything and are always empty. They serve quickly and with the best service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRemJIYnlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Ideal para descansar con niños, con juegos de plaza para despejar un rato y seguir viaje

(Translated by Google)
Ideal for relaxing with children, with playground games to clear your mind and continue your journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncE5DclFBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy bien cuidado y atendido

(Translated by Google)
Very well cared for and looked after
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBM2JlWGJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Atienden muy bien y reciben todos los medios de pago. No tienen termo de agua.

(Translated by Google)
They provide excellent service and accept all forms of payment. They don't have a water heater.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18309083315201690451/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMDYzM0VREAE

reviews.comment:
Gente muy amable. Estan remodelado.

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly people. They've been remodeled.
